sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36360" key="e)ntu/pwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντῠ´π-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n36360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is graved,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χηλῆς ἐ.,</foreign> of a pier, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">92</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
